# PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.acknowledge

**Case**

A job that requires acknowledgement.

## Declaration

```swift
case acknowledge
```

## Discussion

An acknowledgeable job has a [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetResourceUploadJob/state-swift.property] of `succeeded` or `failed` and hasn’t been acknowledged.

Call [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetResourceUploadJobChangeRequest/acknowledge()] to acknowledge a job and free queue capacity for new uploads.

## Actions

- **PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.retry**: A job to retry processing.
title: PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.acknowledge
